whitefly.name: Whitefly (Safed Makhi)
whitefly.symptoms: Tiny white flying insects on leaf undersides. Leaves turn yellow, sticky honeydew, sooty mold.
whitefly.treatment: Neem oil 5ml/L spray. Yellow sticky traps (10/acre). Imidacloprid 0.5ml/L if severe.

fall_armyworm.name: Fall Armyworm
fall_armyworm.symptoms: Ragged holes in leaves, windowpane damage, frass (sawdust-like droppings) in leaf whorl.
fall_armyworm.treatment: Hand-pick early morning. Neem oil 5ml/L. Emamectin benzoate 0.4g/L if severe. Pheromone traps.

bollworm.name: Cotton Bollworm (Heliothis)
bollworm.symptoms: Holes in bolls/fruits, larvae inside bolls, boll shedding.
bollworm.treatment: Pheromone traps (5/acre). Neem seed kernel extract 5%. HaNPV spray. Spinosad if severe.

rice_blast.name: Rice Blast (Magnaporthe oryzae)
rice_blast.symptoms: Diamond-shaped spots on leaves with gray center and brown border. Neck rot at panicle base.
rice_blast.treatment: Tricyclazole 0.6g/L spray. Avoid excess nitrogen. Use resistant varieties. Maintain proper spacing.

leaf_curl_virus.name: Tomato Leaf Curl Virus
leaf_curl_virus.symptoms: Upward curling of leaves, stunted growth, small leaves, yellow margins.
leaf_curl_virus.treatment: Remove infected plants. Control whitefly (vector). Use resistant varieties. Silver mulch repels whitefly.

stem_borer.name: Stem Borer (Rice/Sugarcane)
stem_borer.symptoms: Dead heart in young plants, white ear in mature plants, bore holes in stem.
stem_borer.treatment: Light traps. Trichogramma release (egg parasitoid). Carbofuran 3G in whorl. Clip tips of seedlings.

powdery_mildew.name: Powdery Mildew
powdery_mildew.symptoms: White powdery coating on leaves, stems, flowers. Leaves curl and drop.
powdery_mildew.treatment: Sulfur 2g/L spray. Baking soda 5g/L. Remove affected parts. Improve air circulation.

early_blight.name: Early Blight (Alternaria)
early_blight.symptoms: Concentric ring-shaped brown spots on lower leaves first. Leaf yellowing and drop.
early_blight.treatment: Mancozeb 2g/L spray every 7 days. Remove infected leaves. Mulch to prevent soil splash.
